title: Pavilion Remotion Template Registry Schema
description: Defines the structure for registering Remotion video scene templates. Each entry maps a template ID to its Remotion composition, props, assets, and suitability metadata used by the agentic pipeline for mix-and-match video generation.

version.description: Semantic version of this registry file

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last registry update

id.description: Snake-case unique identifier used in the agent pipeline (e.g. 'hero_headline')

composition_id.description: Exact Remotion <Composition id> string registered in Root.tsx (e.g. 'HeroHeadline')

category.description: Broad visual category for grouping and mix-and-match logic

description.description: Detailed description of the visual layout, animations, and best use-cases. Written for both humans and LLM agents.

thumbnail_url.description: Optional preview image URL (relative path or https://)

required.description: Props that MUST be provided — pipeline will fail without these

optional.description: Props that have sensible defaults — pipeline works without these

assets.description: Image/video/audio slots needed by this template

suitable_for.description: Content-type tags the agent uses to match this template to a story

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and search (mood, style, sport, language)

file.description: Path to the TSX component file relative to remotion-renderer/src/ (e.g. 'scenes/Scene1.tsx')

exported_component.description: Named export from the file (defaults to PascalCase of id if omitted)

clips.description: Timeline clip descriptors used by the Video Studio editor

key.description: Prop name as used in the TSX component

slot.description: Prop key that receives the asset URL

description.description: What image/video is ideal for this slot

search_hint.description: Hint for the ImageFetcherAgent to find a good match

color.description: Hex color for the Video Studio timeline
